title: Customer can discover a provider and create a booking
description: A customer can find a provider, open the booking flow, and create a booking that appears in their booking list.

steps.description: Fill in the customer email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the customer password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Use the provider discovery controls to find a suitable provider
Open the booking flow for the chosen provider
Fill in the booking details with valid service, date, time, and amount values
Verify the new booking appears in the booking list
Verify the booking is shown in a requested state

title: Verify a payment and complete the booking
description: A customer can verify a payment after initiation and the booking is marked as completed.

steps.description: Fill in the customer login credentials
Open the payment page for a completed booking
Verify the booking is marked completed

title: Customer can register and restore the session
description: A new customer can register successfully, and the app restores the authenticated session on reload so booking actions can continue without signing in again.

steps.description: Fill in the customer name field with a unique valid name
Fill in the email field with a unique valid email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Verify the authenticated session is restored

title: Initiate payment for a completed booking
description: A customer can initiate payment for a completed booking and see the payment order details returned in the UI.

steps.description: Fill in the customer login credentials
Open the payment page for a completed booking
Verify payment order details are displayed

title: Provider can log in and restore the session
description: A provider can log in successfully, and the authenticated session remains available after refresh so provider actions do not require re-login.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated session is restored

title: Provider can accept and advance a booking
description: A provider can view pending jobs, accept a request, and advance the booking through the on-the-way and reached states.

steps.description: Fill in the provider email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the provider password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Mark the booking as on the way
Verify the booking is shown in the reached state
Verify the job remains available in the provider workflow

title: Create a booking from a discovered provider
description: A customer can discover a provider and create a booking that is available in the booking list.

steps.description: Fill in the required booking details
Verify the booking appears in the booking list

title: Customer can track a booking through arrival confirmation
description: A customer can open a booking in tracking view and confirm arrival after the provider marks the booking as reached.

steps.description: Fill in the customer email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the customer password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the tracking view for an active booking
Confirm provider arrival on the tracking page
Verify the booking arrival confirmation is visible
Verify the booking progresses to the arrival-confirmed state

title: Restore a signed-in session after refresh
description: An authenticated user can refresh the app and continue using booking or payment features without signing in again.

steps.description: Verify booking or payment actions remain available

title: Customer can pay with a promo code and complete the booking
description: A customer can initiate payment with a promo code, verify the discounted amount, and finish with the booking marked completed.

steps.description: Fill in the customer email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the customer password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the payments page for an arrived booking
Verify the discounted payment is reflected
Verify the booking is marked completed

title: Browse providers on the discovery page
description: A customer can open the discovery page and see available service providers listed for browsing.

title: Find nearby providers from a location search
description: A customer can search nearby providers using valid coordinates and see nearby providers displayed.

steps.description: Fill in a valid search radius

title: Filter providers by category and location
description: A customer can narrow the provider list using category and location filters and see matching providers.

steps.description: Verify the provider list updates to matching providers

title: Apply a valid promo code during payment
description: A customer can apply a valid promo code on the payment page and see the discounted payment details.

steps.description: Fill in the customer login credentials
Open the payment page for a completed booking
Verify discounted payment details are displayed

title: Customer can browse providers by category and location
description: A customer can filter the provider list by category and location and see matching providers update on the page.

steps.description: Fill in the customer email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the customer password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a location filter with a valid location
Verify the provider results are filtered

title: Customer can cancel an allowed booking
description: A customer can cancel a booking only when cancellation is allowed, and the booking updates to a cancelled state.

steps.description: Fill in the customer email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the customer password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a booking that is still eligible for cancellation
Verify the booking is shown as cancelled
Verify the booking is removed from active booking progress

title: Customer can register with a profile photo
description: A customer can complete registration with an optional profile photo and receive an authenticated account.

steps.description: Fill in the customer name field with a unique valid name
Fill in the email field with a unique valid email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Verify the account is created successfully
Verify the authenticated user profile is available

title: Customer sees promo code validation feedback
description: Entering an invalid promo code during payment shows validation feedback and does not apply a discount.

steps.description: Fill in the customer email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the customer password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the payments page for an eligible booking
Attempt to apply the promo code
Verify promo code validation feedback is visible

title: User sees validation feedback for incomplete registration
description: Submitting registration with missing required details shows validation feedback and prevents account creation.

steps.description: Submit the registration form with required fields left empty
Verify the registration does not complete

title: Show feedback for an invalid promo code
description: A customer sees an error state when applying an invalid promo code during payment.

steps.description: Fill in the customer login credentials
Open the payment page for a completed booking
Verify a promo code error message is visible

title: User sees feedback for invalid login credentials
description: Entering invalid login credentials shows an authentication error and does not sign the user in.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with an invalid email
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Verify an authentication error is visible
Verify the user remains logged out

title: Show validation for incomplete nearby search fields
description: A customer sees validation feedback when trying to search nearby providers without the required location details.

steps.description: Leave the nearby search coordinates empty
Verify a location validation message is visible

title: User cannot complete a booking too early
description: Attempting to move a booking to completed before the required prior statuses shows an invalid transition and leaves the booking unchanged.

steps.description: Fill in the provider email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the provider password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a booking that has not reached the required stage
Attempt to mark the booking as completed
Verify an invalid transition message is visible
Verify the booking status does not change
